title: The Broken Script
body:
**READ THE DESCRIPTION, PLEASE.**

# Version 2.0 is in development! Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/nullnullnullnull) to stay up-to-date!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/purgl-2pDM0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# THE BROKEN SCRIPT
## The world they built. The world they hate.
![Title screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TocuaDpt/images/d50e858c019e175fba02ac77b15a6ded7c7aafbf.png)
#
**The one and only official version of the mod is on modrinth and CF, do not trust any fakers.**
#
****THINGS YOU WANT TO KNOW BEFORE PLAYING****
- Mod can ban you from your world
- Mod can crash the game
- Mod can create txts on your desktop
- Mod can shake your game window
- Mod can create custom error popups on your desktop
- Mod WILL grief your world
- Mod WILL destroy your buildings
- DO NOT PLAY THIS MOD WITH SHADERS THAT CHANGE TEXTURE OF THE MOON
- DO NOT PLAY THIS MOD WITH WORLD GEN MODS! (Some events will break right now)
- I won't upload the "unsafe" version to modrinth, do not ask me to do so, it has been discontinued

The Broken Script is a (VERY) slow horror mod that will try to make you feel paranoid. There are random events, few entities and anomalies (and much more)

To access mod config use /tbs_config

**Frequently asked questions:**
- Q: How to remove black borders on my screen?
  - A: /tbs_config
- Q: Why did mod leave modrinth for some time?
  - A: Misunderstandings with some people and the mod's capabilities
- Q: I've got trapped in a infinite maze of cobblestone/bedrock rooms/hallway, what do I do?
  - A: It should teleport you back after some time. Do not leave the game.
- Q: When bedrock port?
  - A: There won't be a bedrock port.
- Q: How do I configure the 1.21.1 port?
  - A: Go to the pause menu, click on "Mods", find "The Broken Script", and click on "config" like any other mod
- Q: How to give faces to entities?
  - A: ...
- Q: <o>
  - A: <o>

# Credits
- Logo - MSSHD
- Some entities/parts of the looore - Mark101
- Calm5.ogg [edited] - Mark101
- New menu backgrounds - @realherobeing & @ThatAncient2
- Nostalgia resource pack is a modified version of [The Original Work](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/theoriginalwork) by JDG
- Integrityphase3loop.ogg/Murderfur chase theme (Unused in the mod itself but still can be found in the mod files of certain versions) - vitos21
- 1.10.1 includes some classes from [owo-lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib), under the MIT license.

## Need a new Minecraft server? Check out our partner, [lagless.gg](https://lagless.gg/aff/thebrokenscript)!
